name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn
N \in Nat
N > 0

(* State variables *)
state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
turn \in 1..N

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ (* Process p attempts to enter critical section *)
        /\ \E p \in 1..N :
           /\ state[p] = "idle"
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
           /\ turn' = turn
        \/ (* Process p enters critical section *)
        /\ \E p \in 1..N :
           /\ state[p] = "trying"
           /\ turn = p
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
           /\ turn' = turn
        \/ (* Process p exits critical section *)
        /\ \E p \in 1..N :
           /\ state[p] = "critical"
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
           /\ turn' = turn

(* Invariant: at most one process is in critical section *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
           /\ turn \in 1..N
           /\ Cardinality({p \in 1..N : state[p] = "critical"}) <= 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES forks, states



(* State variables *)
(* forks: [1..N -> 0..N] 0 means fork is free, otherwise holds philosopher number who holds it *)
(* states: [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}] *)

(* Helper predicates *)
ForkFree(i) == forks[i] = 0
ForkHeldBy(i, p) == forks[i] = p
PhilosopherHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
PhilosopherEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"
PhilosopherThinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ ForkFree(i)
          /\ ForkFree(%(i, N)+1)
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N)+1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![%(i, N)+1] = 0]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ states[i] = "thinking"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
          /\ forks' = forks

(* Invariant: No two philosophers hold the same fork *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = 0 \/ forks[i] \in 1..N
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : states[i] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = 0
      /\ flag = <<>>


Next == /\ num' = num + 1
      /\ flag' = Append(flag, num + 1)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)  /\ head \in 1..K  /\ tail \in 1..K  /\ count \in 0..K
      /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]  /\ head = 1  /\ tail = 1  /\ count = 0

ProducerAction == /\ count < K
                /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
                /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                /\ count' = count + 1
                /\ head' = head

ConsumerAction == /\ count > 0
                /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
                /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                /\ count' = count - 1
                /\ tail' = tail

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

TypeOK == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ count \in 0..K

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active, r

Init == /\ readers = <<>> \\
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers \\
          /\ r' = r \\
             /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = %(token, N) + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V, NULL

VARIABLES
  acceptors, proposers, promises, accepted, chosen, ballot, value

TypeOK ==
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot : Int, value : V]]
  /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot : Int, value : V]]
  /\ promises \in [1..N -> [ballot : Int, value : V]]
  /\ accepted \in [1..N -> [ballot : Int, value : V]]
  /\ chosen \in [1..N -> [ballot : Int, value : V]]

Init ==
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
  /\ proposers = [j \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
  /\ promises = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
  /\ accepted = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
  /\ chosen = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]

Prepare(j) ==
  /\ proposers[j].ballot' = proposers[j].ballot + 1
  /\ proposers[j].value' = proposers[j].value
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ promises' = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> proposers[j].ballot', value |-> NULL]]
  /\ accepted' = accepted
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Accept(j) ==
  /\ proposers[j].ballot' = proposers[j].ballot
  /\ proposers[j].value' = proposers[j].value
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ promises' = promises
  /\ accepted' = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> proposers[j].ballot', value |-> proposers[j].value]]
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Chosen(i) ==
  /\ acceptors[i].ballot' = acceptors[i].ballot
  /\ acceptors[i].value' = acceptors[i].value
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ promises' = promises
  /\ accepted' = accepted
  /\ chosen' = [j \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> acceptors[i].ballot, value |-> acceptors[i].value]]

Next ==
  \/ \E j \in 1..M : Prepare(j)
  \/ \E j \in 1..M : Accept(j)
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : Chosen(i)

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, promises, accepted, chosen>>
